text.title: Embedding Chunking Strategies Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from corpus classification to deployed chunker.

step.name: classify-corpus
step.action: Tag each doc by class: prose / code / structured / mixed.

step.name: pick-strategy
step.action: Prose → recursive/sentence_aware. Code → structural. Structured → header_aware. Mixed → per_doc_route.

step.name: sweep-chunk-size
step.action: Index each combo; measure Recall@10 on bench. Pick best.

step.name: bench-gate
step.action: Recall@10 ≥ baseline? If yes promote; else block.
